# MingLi-Bench Local Copy

Date collected: 2026-05-20

Source:
- https://github.com/DestinyLinker/MingLi-Bench
- https://destinylinker.github.io/MingLi-Bench/

Local files:
- `data.json`
- `fortune_api_results.json`
- `README_zh.md`
- `LICENSE`

Observed scope:
- 160 multiple-choice questions.
- 32 cases.
- 12 categories.
- 32 pre-computed chart records.

License observed:
- MIT license in upstream repository.

Important limitation:
- Upstream says the corpus is sourced from the annual Global Fortune Teller Competition for 2022-2025.
- The official 2025 competition page was later verified at HKJFMA.
- The official page verifies competition existence, but does not by itself grant broad reuse rights.
- Treat this as benchmark candidate, not final authority, until source and usage rights are confirmed.

Official source verification:
- https://hkjfma.org/2025/06/2025%E5%B9%B4%E7%AC%AC%E5%8D%81%E5%85%AD%E5%B1%86-%E5%85%A8%E7%90%83%E7%AE%97%E5%91%BD%E5%B8%AB%E6%AF%94%E8%B3%BD
